query:
insert into person_attributes (person_id, kind, value, value_wikidata_id, source_id)
        values ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
        on conflict (person_id, kind, value) do update set
            value_wikidata_id = excluded.value_wikidata_id,
            source_id = excluded.source_id
        returning id
